mechanics.excerpt: Every warrior undergoes at least one Trial of Position upon graduating from cadet training: Additional trials throughout warrior' career play major role in determining promotions and demotions Though the exact details vary among Clans cadet' = tial Trial of Position involves defeating opponents in deadly com bat: The cadet must defeat at least one warrior to gain warrior status_ The more enemies defeated; the higher the rank the new warror earns One victory grants warrior status the rank of Star Commander ad three the rank of Star Captain: but Fare is the Trial of Annihilation_ the Clans ultimate punish ment Whenever an individual; unit Or even an entire Clan has been found guilty grave crime: their fellow Clansmen attempt exterminate them through this trial; the guilty are lucky enough sur vive_ they are exonerated GOVERNMENT The warrior caste governs the Clans indirectly; through sev eral bodies and selected individuals_ Participation governing i5 restricted to Bloodnamed warriors thougn non Bloodnamed warriors may Observe the proceedings.
